prompt: Hyper-realistic lifestyle fashion portrait. A lively young adult East Asian woman sitting diagonally on a deep navy blue vinyl bench inside an old cream-colored public transport carriage. A teeth-baring bright natural smile looking directly at the camera. Soft arched dark eyebrows, almond-shaped brown eyes, natural coral pink lip color. Glowing skin, light peach blush, soft eyelashes. Long thick dark brown-black hair falling below the chest in loose messy waves. Wearing a delicate white crop top made of lightweight translucent Swiss dot chiffon. High-waisted deep indigo denim shorts. One leg extends toward the camera for depth. Warm late morning sunlight shines through an open window creating gold-white rim lights. Background is a sunny park with lush green grass and deciduous trees, heavily blurred with large bokeh. Shot with a full-frame 50-70mm lens at f/2-f/2.8. Film grain effect with smooth tonal transitions and cinematic tones.
promptEn: Hyper-realistic lifestyle fashion portrait. A lively young adult East Asian woman sitting diagonally on a deep navy blue vinyl bench inside an old cream-colored public transport carriage. A teeth-baring bright natural smile looking directly at the camera. Soft arched dark eyebrows, almond-shaped brown eyes, natural coral pink lip color. Glowing skin, light peach blush, soft eyelashes. Long thick dark brown-black hair falling below the chest in loose messy waves. Wearing a delicate white crop top made of lightweight translucent Swiss dot chiffon. High-waisted deep indigo denim shorts. One leg extends toward the camera for depth. Warm late morning sunlight shines through an open window creating gold-white rim lights. Background is a sunny park with lush green grass and deciduous trees, heavily blurred with large bokeh. Shot with a full-frame 50-70mm lens at f/2-f/2.8. Film grain effect with smooth tonal transitions and cinematic tones.
promptZh: 超写实生活时尚肖像。一位充满活力的年轻女性 东亚女性 斜坐在 深海军蓝 的乙烯基长椅上，身处 旧式奶油色公共交通车厢 内。她露齿而笑，笑容明媚自然，直视镜头。眉毛呈柔和的拱形，深褐色杏仁眼，自然的珊瑚粉色唇妆。皮肤透亮，带有淡淡的桃色腮红，睫毛柔顺。浓密的长发呈深棕黑色，凌乱的波浪卷垂至胸下。身穿一件由轻盈半透明瑞士圆点雪纺制成的精致白色短款上衣，搭配深靛蓝色高腰牛仔短裤。一条腿向镜头方向伸展以增加景深。温暖的上午阳光透过开着的窗户射入，形成金白色的轮廓光。背景是阳光明媚的公园，有茂密的绿草和落叶乔木，经过重度虚化，呈现出大光斑效果。使用全画幅 50-70mm 镜头，光圈 f/2-f/2.8 拍摄。带有胶片颗粒感，色调过渡平滑，呈现电影级质感。
